privacy.title: Kaupapa Here Matapiko
privacy.dataNotice: Ka whakamunatia ō raraunga (īmera, ingoa, IBAN) ka whakamahia anake mō te tukatuka tuku moni. Kei a koe te tika ki te uru, ki te whakatika, me te muku i ō raraunga i ngā wā katoa.
privacy.agree: Kua pānui ahau, ā, e whakaae ana ahau ki te Kaupapa Here Matapiko

deleteAccount.title: Mukua te Pūkete
deleteAccount.description: Mukua pūmau tō pūkete me ngā raraunga katoa.
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Ka mukua pūmau ō raraunga pūkete katoa. Mēnā kei te tino hiahia koe, pāwhiritia "Whakaū" kia haere tonu. Kāore e taea te whakakore i tēnei mahi.
notification.title: Whakamōhiotanga
notification.changeRequest: kei te tono whakaaetanga ki te whakarerekē
privacy.textCollection: Ka kohia e ForeXchange ngā raraunga whaiaro e tika ana anake mō te tukatuka tuku moni: tō īmera, ingoa katoa, me ngā taipitopito IBAN o te kaiwhiwhi. Kāore e rongoatia ngā tohu moni tairongo i tua atu i te mea e hiahiatia ana mō te tautukunga whakawhitinga.
privacy.sectionEncryption: Te Rongoa Raraunga me te Whakamunatanga
privacy.textEncryption: Ka whakamunatia ngā kupuhipa mā te whakamahi i te Argon2id me te Bcrypt mā te pwdlib - kāore rawa e rongoatia hei kuputuhi noa. Ka tukuna ngā raraunga katoa mā te TLS, ka rongoatia ki te pātengi raraunga PostgreSQL me te whakatūturu taumata-ārona. Ka whakamahia ngā pane haumaru (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection) i ia whakautu.
privacy.textAccess: Ka whakatinana a ForeXchange i te mana whakauru i runga i te tūranga (RBAC) me ngā tūranga e rua: **Kaihoko** me **Kaiarotake**. Ko ngā mara tairongo pērā i te IBAN kaiwhiwhi me ngā taipitopito tautukunga ka kitea anake e ngā kaiwhakamahi Kaiarotake whai mana. Ka whakamōtia ia whakauru raraunga mā ngā tohu JWT.
privacy.textDeletion: Ka taea e koe te tono kia mukua rawatia tō pūkete me ō raraunga i ngā wā katoa mā te whārangi Tautuhinga. Ina mukua, kāore e puritia ngā kape toenga o ō raraunga whaiaro. E hāngai ana tēnei ki te mātāpono o te whakaiti raraunga me tō mana kia warewaretia.
privacy.sectionSovereignty: Te Mana Motuhake o ngā Raraunga
privacy.textSovereignty: E whakaute ana a ForeXchange i ngā mana motuhake o ngā tāngata me ngā hapori ki ō rātou raraunga. Kua hoahoatia te pūnaha kia kite koe i ngā raraunga e kohia ana, me pēhea te whakamahi, me te kaha ki te whakakore i te whakaaetanga i ngā wā katoa. E whai ana ēnei whakamarumaru i ngā mātāpono o Te Mana Raraunga me te New Zealand Privacy Act 2020.
privacy.textContact: Mō ngā pātai e pā ana ki tēnei kaupapa here, ki te whakamahi rānei i ō mana raraunga, whakatuwhera tēnā i tētahi take i runga i tā mātou pūranga GitHub, whakapā atu rānei ki te kaitiaki kaupapa.
